# OpenWrt Curated LuCI Application Examples
# Source: https://github.com/openwrt/luci/tree/master/applications
# Generated: 2026-03-05 18:43 UTC from LuCI commit 6959675
#
# Four apps selected for distinct pedagogical value. Together they cover the
# full range of modern LuCI development patterns. All files are raw upstream
# source code — unmodified, suitable for direct use as coding templates.
#
# Recommended reading order:
#   1. luci-app-example    — baseline structure and ucode<->JS bridge
#   2. luci-app-commands   — HTTP endpoints and controller pattern
#   3. luci-app-ddns       — config management and service state
#   4. luci-app-dockerman  — advanced sockets, streaming, multi-file
#
## Application Files


## luci-app-example
# Pattern: Hello world / baseline — minimum viable app; ucode<->JS bridge, ACL, UCI form, rpcd scaffolding
# Source: https://github.com/openwrt/luci/tree/master/applications/luci-app-example
# Files: 1 .uc (ucode backend), 5 .js (JavaScript frontend)
#
# File tree:
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/form.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/htmlview.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/rpc-jsonmap-tablesection.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/rpc-jsonmap-typedsection.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/rpc.js
#   [ucode]  root/usr/share/rpcd/ucode/example.uc
#
- [luci-app-example/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/form.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-example/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/form.js): luci-app-example — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-example/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/htmlview.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-example/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/htmlview.js): luci-app-example — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-example/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/rpc-jsonmap-tablesection.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-example/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/rpc-jsonmap-tablesection.js): luci-app-example — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-example/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/rpc-jsonmap-typedsection.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-example/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/rpc-jsonmap-typedsection.js): luci-app-example — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-example/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/rpc.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-example/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/example/rpc.js): luci-app-example — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-example/root/usr/share/rpcd/ucode/example.uc](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-example/root/usr/share/rpcd/ucode/example.uc): luci-app-example — ucode backend


## luci-app-commands
# Pattern: HTTP API / controller — custom endpoints in ucode/controller/, URL parsing, secure popen execution
# Source: https://github.com/openwrt/luci/tree/master/applications/luci-app-commands
# Files: 1 .uc (ucode backend), 1 .js (JavaScript frontend)
#
# File tree:
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/commands.js
#   [ucode]  ucode/controller/commands.uc
#
- [luci-app-commands/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/commands.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-commands/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/commands.js): luci-app-commands — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-commands/ucode/controller/commands.uc](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-commands/ucode/controller/commands.uc): luci-app-commands — ucode backend


## luci-app-ddns
# Pattern: Standard config app — service state (init_enabled), rpcd microbus, deep UCI read/write
# Source: https://github.com/openwrt/luci/tree/master/applications/luci-app-ddns
# Files: 1 .uc (ucode backend), 2 .js (JavaScript frontend)
#
# File tree:
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/ddns/overview.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/status/include/70_ddns.js
#   [ucode]  root/usr/share/rpcd/ucode/ddns.uc
#
- [luci-app-ddns/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/ddns/overview.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-ddns/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/ddns/overview.js): luci-app-ddns — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-ddns/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/status/include/70_ddns.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-ddns/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/status/include/70_ddns.js): luci-app-ddns — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-ddns/root/usr/share/rpcd/ucode/ddns.uc](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-ddns/root/usr/share/rpcd/ucode/ddns.uc): luci-app-ddns — ucode backend


## luci-app-dockerman
# Pattern: Advanced / streaming — UNIX socket communication, HTTP streaming, large JSON, multi-file ucode
# Source: https://github.com/openwrt/luci/tree/master/applications/luci-app-dockerman
# Files: 3 .uc (ucode backend), 13 .js (JavaScript frontend)
#
# File tree:
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/dockerman/api.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/dockerman/common.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/configuration.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/container.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/container_new.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/containers.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/events.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/images.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/network.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/network_new.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/networks.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/overview.js
#   [js]     htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/volumes.js
#   [ucode]  root/usr/share/rpcd/ucode/docker_rpc.uc
#   [ucode]  ucode/controller/docker.uc
#   [ucode]  ucode/docker_socket.uc
#
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/dockerman/api.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/dockerman/api.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/dockerman/common.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/dockerman/common.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/configuration.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/configuration.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/container.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/container.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/container_new.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/container_new.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend

- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/events.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/events.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/images.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/images.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/network.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/network.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/network_new.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/network_new.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/networks.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/networks.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/overview.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/overview.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
- [luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/volumes.js](/openwrt-examples/luci-app-dockerman/htdocs/luci-static/resources/view/dockerman/volumes.js): luci-app-dockerman — JavaScript frontend
